channel.title: Pages on Field Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Field Notes

item.title: Signals & Traces
item.description:
Things that have passed through my attention.

Recently Heard

  • No Doubt

  • Deadmou5

Recently Read

  • The Wicked + The Divine

Recently Watched

  • Masters of the Universe
  • Tales from the Crypt
  • House Party 1-3

Recently Noticed

  • Will-o-the-wisp adventures often end up right where you started, only a little more aware of the landscape…if you turn back in time.
  • Learning best is learning slowly.

item.title: About
item.description: My field notes are where I’ll drop reflections on experiences and updates about what’s going on; what I’m watching, listening to, doing. Early-morning and late-night musings when things are quiet and I can hear myself think.
